raw.message: War Thunder Mobile lets you drive, sail and fly meticulously modeled WWII and Cold War vehicles in live PvP battles

hook.summary: A massive explosion on a battleship deck followed by the vessel charging through smoke.
hook.visual_action: A close-up explosion on a camouflaged battleship transitions into the ship sailing directly toward the camera through a cloud of black smoke.

scene_flow: Cinematic explosion on the deck of a battleship followed by the ship emerging from smoke.
Wide shot of the USS Colorado in a naval battle with multiple ships and explosions in the background.
Close-up of the ship's main battery turrets firing during an intense engagement.
A seaplane launches from the deck of the battleship and flies over the water.
Final shot of the seaplane flying past the ship with the game logo appearing on screen.
audience_proxy: Men 18-45 who enjoy realistic military history and high-fidelity naval combat simulators.
